summary: >-
  Revival Animal Health of Orange City, Iowa, expanded its recall on June 25 to
  include Breeder’s Edge Foster Care GM goat milk products after testing
  confirmed elevated vitamin D levels. The original April 17 recall covered
  Breeder’s Edge Foster Care Canine and Shelter’s Choice Canine Milk Replacers
  due to variable vitamin D levels, with some products containing too much or
  too little. Dogs and puppies consuming affected products may experience
  vomiting, weakness, weight loss, or rickets, with two rickets complaints
  reported. Affected products were sold nationwide in various sizes. Owners

Revival Animal Health of Orange City, Iowa, expanded its recall on June 25 to include Breeder’s Edge Foster Care GM goat milk products after testing confirmed elevated vitamin D levels. The original April 17 recall covered Breeder’s Edge Foster Care Canine and Shelter’s Choice Canine Milk Replacers due to variable vitamin D levels, with some products containing too much or too little. Dogs and puppies consuming affected products may experience vomiting, weakness, weight loss, or rickets, with two rickets complaints reported. Affected products were sold nationwide in various sizes. Owners should stop using them and call 1-877-870-4059 for a full refund.

[Read the full report on Google News →](https://news.google.?oc=5)
